}` when a tool call is requested for a tool not in the allowlist

content.text:
I have all the information needed. Line 70 in tool_enforcement.rs is a pattern-match arm, and line 202 in v2_runtime_smoke.rs is also a pattern-match inside `find_map`. Only lines 273 (agent_loop.rs) and 92 (tool_enforcement.rs) are actual constructions.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` directly via `sink.emit(...)` when the agent loop's own policy check denies a tool call
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` (line 92) when `EnforcedAuditSink` intercepts a `ToolCallRequested` event for a tool not in the allowlist — the "bypass catch" path described in the comment

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
